posts.author: ilariatottolo2 (ilaria)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to share some feedback regarding the Salesforce integration:

Currently, recipes can stop working unexpectedly, which causes Salesforce to disconnect from monday.com. When this happens, error messages are shown only to the user who triggered the recipe, without notifying the platform admins. It would be much more effective if such errors were also communicated to admins, so they can take timely action to resolve the issue.

If this feedback is helpful, I hope you’ll consider it for future improvements.

posts.author: sherri54labrecque1 (Sherri Labrecque)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
Thanks for the info I will try to figure it out for more.

Best regards,
Sherri
